name: Fiddlehead Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle the uncooked pie shell with flour.
2. Beat the eggs.
3. Add milk, cheese, fiddleheads, mushrooms, green onions, and seasonings to the beaten eggs.
4. Pour the mixture into the pie shell.
5. Top with crumbled bacon.
6. Bake at 190°C for 35 to 40 minutes or until the top is golden brown.
